paragraphs: Department: Computer Engineering       Academic Year: 2025- 2026                    Semester: I /II
We are sorry to inform you that attendance of your ward Dhruv Borole  PRN No. 122B1B041 Year B.tech Div A is poor.
1. Subject wise attendance up to 30/08/202 is as follows.

If he fails to improve attendance and to satisfy to minimum criteria of 75% attendance in theory and practical’s conducted, by college, he shall not be eligible to appear for Final SA in Semester I / II Theory Examination.
Class Teacher                         Academic Coordinator                                 Head of the Department
Mr. Ganesh Kadam                  Mr. Atul Pawar                                           Dr. Sonali Patil
